Entity Profile
F

Azimuth Biotech

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3308-06-20 · 47 mentions
Active: 3308-06-20 → 3309-07-20
Related Entities
L
HIP 22460
F
Alliance
F
Empire
F
Federation
F
Aegis
L
Bright Sentinel
L
Glorious Prospect
F
Alliance Defence Force
Mentions Timeline (47 articles)
3309-07-20
Azimuth Releases New AX Weapon
Azimuth's convention succeeds and the new Overcharged Gimballed AX Multi-Cannon with Auto Loader is released, with speculation about Holloway Bioscience Institute collaboration.
3309-07-13
Deliver Rarities for Azimuth Event
Azimuth requests rare commodities for its business convention and offers pre-engineered AX Multi-Cannons as rewards, while Corcoran criticizes the company's war escalation history.
3309-07-10
Azimuth Plans Corporate Convention
Azimuth Biotech plans an invitation-only business convention to seek partnerships, with speculation about a new weapon schematic and concerns about corporate secrecy.
3309-06-30
Thargoid War Update: June 3309
Sanderlyn's monthly update covers the pulse wave scanner release, the Aegis-Azimuth sample competition, the Dedicant disappearance, and cautious optimism about territorial gains.
3309-06-22
Aegis Receives Titan Materials for Xeno-Research
Aegis's campaign to collect Titan tissue samples outperforms Azimuth's rival effort, with Fonseca praising pilot courage and scientific potential.
3309-06-15
Aegis and Azimuth Compete for Titan Samples
Aegis and Azimuth Biotech launch rival campaigns to collect Titan tissue samples, with Aegis promising research advancements and Azimuth promising military countermeasures.
3309-06-09
Azimuth Refocuses on Titan Research
Azimuth Biotech announces a priority focus on Thargoid Titan research, framing it as both scientific and commercial opportunity.
3309-05-29
Thargoid War Update: May 3309
Sanderlyn reports on the Titan discoveries, Glaive-class hunters, Revenant ground drones, and the pulse wave scanner project, with Rademaker criticizing Tesreau's address.
3309-04-28
Thargoid War Update: April 3309
Sanderlyn's monthly update covers the devastating scale of the Thargoid invasion, the Tavgi/Pichch superpower conflicts, Aegis's pulse neutraliser development, and Azimuth's struggles without Salvation.
3309-04-11
Salvation-Utopia Link Raises Concerns
Questions arise about a possible connection between Salvation's Nemesis Failsafe and Utopia's Sim-Archive, with Fonseca arranging a visit to investigate.
3309-03-20
Rumours Circulate Around Seo Jin-ae
Rumors suggest Seo Jin-ae has been kidnapped or assassinated; Aegis is investigating, while Azimuth claims she has 'dissociative disorder and paranoid delusions.'
3309-02-01
Class 5 Experimental Weapons Stabiliser Released
Azimuth Biotech commercially launches a class 5 experimental weapons stabiliser that allows large ships to mount six AX weapons.
3309-01-26
Experimental Weapons Stabiliser Becomes Available
The class 3 experimental weapon stabiliser enters the market after Azimuth Biotech's successful delivery initiative in LHS 1163.
3309-01-19
Experimental Weapon Stabiliser Initiative Begins
Azimuth Biotech launches a material delivery initiative in LHS 1163 to mass-produce its experimental weapon stabiliser for anti-xeno combat.
3309-01-12
Azimuth Announces Experimental Weapons Stabiliser
Azimuth Biotech unveils its experimental weapons stabiliser at the TZ Arietis Weapon Expo and condemns Admiral Tanner's recent presidential pardon.
3309-01-05
Subject D-2 Departs on Lone Mission
Seo Jin-ae voluntarily departs her medical facility, leaving Professor Alba Tesreau concerned for her safety as Azimuth Biotech questions her mental stability.
3309-01-03
Azimuth Conducts AX Weapons Research
Azimuth Biotech CEO Torben Rademaker announces plans to develop anti-xeno weapon improvements while disavowing Salvation's superweapon research.
3308-09-21
Demands for Azimuth to Face Justice
Widespread calls emerge to prosecute Azimuth Biotech for its role in the HIP 22460 massacre, with Advocacy director Rhiannon Grady demanding criminal charges and CEO Torben Rademaker defending the Proteus Wave as a scientific success.
3308-09-16
The Judgement of Admiral Tanner
The Federal Navy Criminal Court upholds Admiral Aden Tanner's conviction for mutiny but commutes his sentence to time served, acknowledging that preventing the Proteus Wave might have saved many lives.
3308-09-08
Successful Mining Campaign Sustains Azimuth
Azimuth Biotech's mining campaign in LHS 157 succeeds, with Captain Maxim Lagunov confirming deliveries of cobalt, gallite and osmium to sustain the corporation's rebuilding efforts after the Bright Sentinel's destruction.
3308-09-01
Supply Mined Materials to Azimuth Biotech
Azimuth Biotech launches a mining campaign to deliver raw materials to the Glorious Prospect megaship in LHS 157, seeking to rebuild corporate infrastructure after being forced out of Maia, Merope and Qarato.
3308-08-30
A New Chapter for Azimuth
Azimuth Biotech announces a new chapter under acting CEO Torben Rademaker after Salvation's death, with the Musashi returning to T Tauri and the Glorious Prospect jumping to LHS 157 to establish a resource-gathering initiative.
3308-08-26
Retrial Requested for Admiral Tanner
The Federal Attorney's Office calls for Admiral Aden Tanner's conviction to be reviewed in light of HIP 22460, where events validated his accusation that Salvation deliberately attracted Thargoids to test his superweapon.
3308-08-25
Report from HIP 22460: Salvation is Dead
An independent rescue team confirms that Salvation, identified as Dr Caleb Wycherley, was killed aboard the Bright Sentinel in HIP 22460, found dead in his command chair surrounded by shattered cybernetic implants.
3308-08-12
Fleets Withdraw from Thargoid-Controlled System
The superpowers confirm full retreat from HIP 22460 as Thargoids establish a stronghold, with Fleet Admiral Maikori admitting search and rescue windows are closing and Senator Patreus acknowledging the aliens have secured human-occupied space.
3308-08-11
The Silent Aftermath
Two days after the HIP 22460 massacre, authorities maintain silence while Azimuth's surviving megaships accept survivors and medical personnel refuse press access to witnesses.
3308-08-10
Thargoids Conquer HIP 22460
The Proteus Wave fails catastrophically as Thargoid forces overwhelm the coalition fleet in HIP 22460, destroying human ships after a second energy pulse renders them powerless.
3308-08-09
Contact Lost after Proteus Wave Fired
Communication with all ships in HIP 22460 terminates after the Proteus Wave's activation, as a second unknown energy pulse disables the Bright Sentinel and Thargoid vessels regain function, leaving thousands stranded.
3308-08-08
Azimuth Claims Thargoid Doomsday Imminent
Salvation announces the Proteus Wave is fully active and calibrated, predicting that detonation will cause catastrophic disruption to all Thargoid vessels in HIP 22460 and drive the aliens out of the core systems permanently.
3308-08-05
Azimuth Divides Media Opinion
Editorial pieces from across the core systems reveal sharply divided media opinion on Azimuth Biotech and Salvation, ranging from Imperial fears of Federal aggression to concerns about corporate influence and Princess Aisling's warnings of manipulation.
3308-08-04
Resources Supplied to Xeno Retrieval Programme
A delivery campaign to the Glorious Prospect in Pleiades Sector CW-U B3-2 provides vital commodities enabling Azimuth Biotech to analyse salvaged Thargoid wreckages following the Proteus Wave activation in HIP 22460.
3308-08-02
Superpowers Commit to Salvation
The leaders of the Alliance, Empire and Federation publicly confirm their support for Azimuth Biotech's Proteus Wave operation in HIP 22460, dismissing accusations of criminality while deploying capital ships to defend the project.
3308-07-29
Superweapon Construction Completed
Salvation announces the Proteus Wave core mechanism is fully assembled in HIP 22460, with calibration tests beginning within a Thargoid structure to amplify the weapon's disruptive frequencies.
3308-07-28
Thargoid Salvage Operation Requires Resources
Azimuth Biotech requests commodities for its post-Proteus Wave Thargoid salvage operation, with Director Torben Rademaker outlining plans to collect non-human material from HIP 22460 for military intelligence.
3308-07-27
Tesreau Highlights Azimuth's Inhumanity
Professor Alba Tesreau publishes a counter-statement exposing Azimuth's inhumanity, linking HIP 22460 to Project Seraph's Fort Asch experiments, Black Flight's Overlook megaship, and the Alexandria sabotage.
3308-07-26
Guardian Artefact Campaign Concludes
The third phase of Guardian artefact deliveries for the Proteus Wave concludes successfully, with Commodore Morag Halloran announcing the core mechanism is days away from full assembly on HIP 22460 10b.
3308-07-25
Azimuth Condemns 'Alien-Loving' Resistance
Azimuth Biotech director Torben Rademaker condemns Operation Wych Hunt protestors as alien-loving traitors after Azimuth assets are expelled from Merope and Qarato and Hind Mine is attacked.
3308-07-22
The View from the Front Line
Vox Galactica reporter Jade Sanderlyn broadcasts from HIP 22460 describing intense fighting, seven capital ships with experimental weaponry, and Sirius Corporation's El Centinela Cadejo megaship providing logistical support to the Alliance Defence Force.
3308-07-21
Proteus Wave Approaches Completion
Salvation announces the Proteus Wave core mechanism will be fully constructed in one week, with new Federal and Imperial capital ships arriving in HIP 22460 to defend against escalating Thargoid forces.
3308-07-19
Azimuth's Final Call for Guardian Artefacts
Azimuth Biotech issues its final call for Guardian artefacts to complete the Proteus Wave superweapon in HIP 22460, with Commodore Morag Halloran warning of increased Thargoid activity around the Bright Sentinel.
3308-07-15
Azimuth's Plan Elicits Further Reactions
Prominent political figures including Archon Delaine, Yuri Grom, Zemina Torval, Hadrian Duval, Octavia Volkov, and Jasmina Halsey offer contrasting perspectives on Salvation's Proteus Wave operation in HIP 22460.
3308-06-30
'Operation Wych Hunt' Opposes Azimuth Biotech
A coalition of independent Commanders launches 'Operation Wych Hunt' to destabilise Azimuth Biotech, protesting Salvation's identity as Caleb Wycherley and his involvement in the mycoid bioweapon, Project Seraph, and the Alexandria destruction.
3308-06-30
Salvation Prepares 'Final Thargoid Battlefield'
Salvation announces the Proteus Wave construction in HIP 22460, declaring it will be the final battlefield to eradicate Thargoids from the galaxy, with superpower navies and Azimuth megaships mobilising for the operation.
3308-06-30
Urgent Request for Supplies in HIP 22460
Azimuth Biotech requests medical and military commodity deliveries to the Heart of Taurus in HIP 22460 to support Proteus Wave construction and defend against anticipated Thargoid fleets.
3308-06-29
Azimuth: A Historical Perspective (Part Five)
Part five concludes with the Didio-Novas-Sosong invasions, the INRA base discovery in DG Canum Venaticorum revealing Caleb Wycherley's identity as the Witch, Project Seraph survivor D-2's testimony, and Azimuth Biotech's public resurrection.
3308-06-22
Superpowers Stand with Azimuth
The superpowers announce they will continue collaborating with Azimuth Biotech despite revelations about its past, with military leaders arguing Salvation's superweapon is indispensable for ending the Thargoid war.
3308-06-20
Azimuth Resurgent
Salvation publicly reveals that Taurus Mining Ventures is a front for Azimuth Biotech, admitting his identity as Caleb Wycherley's successor and claiming credit for the mycoid virus and Guardian superweapon research.
